rows.3 Inject your dose:
Insert the needle into your skin.
Make sure you can see the dose counter. Do not cover it with your
fingers. This could interrupt the injection.
(See figure L).

Press and hold down the dose button until the dose counter
shows .
(See figure M).
Keep pressing the dose button with the needle in your skin and
slowly count to 6. The must line up with the dose pointer. You
may hear or feel a click when the dose counter returns to .
(See figure N).
